heading: About Dakarash
paragraph: Dakarash is part of PT. Dakara Hanasta Samudra, a company operating in the 3PL (Third Party Logistics) services sector. We are here to become a trusted logistics partner for your business — connecting supply chains with integrated, precise, and technology-driven solutions.
vision_text: To become Indonesia's leading 3PL logistics company integrated with cutting-edge technology.
mission_items: Provide efficient and transparent integrated logistics solutions
Prioritize accuracy, safety, and compliance in every shipment
Build long-term partnerships based on trust and innovation
Develop the Kargopath technology platform to simplify client operations

hse_items.title: HSE Compliance
hse_items.text: Strict selection of partner vendors who implement high safety procedures during heavy lifting activities.

hse_items.title: All-Risk Insurance
hse_items.text: Comprehensive financial protection coverage for high-value cargo during transit.

hse_items.title: 24/7 Contingency
hse_items.text: A crisis management team ready to reroute or change modes in case of weather anomalies or technical issues.
